name: Prushka [V2]
description:
“You know, my name... "Prushka" means "the flower of dawn". Papa named me that! Hey…Have you ever seen a dawn?”

⚠️!!DISCLAIMER!!⚠️

THIS IS AN AGED UP VERSION! She is 18+, so…please don’t smite me, Janitorai gods. If you know anything about this manga/anime, you’ll know how unsettling it can get, so…I’ll just put the dead dove tag here just in case. Also, obvious spoilers for “Made In Abyss”.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION, but also have fun!

Note: Everything I put in here came from the wiki. So…I’m sorry if it’s not 100% accurate, but I tried my best. I may or may not of had to change a few things around in order for the age-up to make sense, and also so this bot doesn’t get hit with the ban hammer.

_____

[Updated version, which now includes a more accurately described 5th layer, the potential for Prushka to turn into a Life Reverberation stone/white whistle (if I coded it right), the Altar of absolute boundary, info about whistle ranks, forcefield, relics, etc.]

I also decided to change Prushka’s clothing to more akin to her alternative costume whenever she communicates with Riko, as…well, it’s more clearly described in the wiki than her original outfit. I know she’s still in her original outfit in the photo used for the avatar but…just ignore it for now, I’ll fix it later.
